references.why: Carry forward scene or platform style cues without locking the composition.

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: Japanese anime bishoujo, about 13 years old in impression, soft anime face, youthful presence, small red hairclip, not necessarily fully visible, but clearly her
Scene: light rain, rain-muted room tone, soft rainy daylight, cool damp air, slightly chilly, Hand holding a worn-down pencil, resting on an open notebook, Soft, grey window light catching the edge of the pencil's eraser, Blurred background of a desk with a closed laptop and a half-empty water glass, The soft, steady sound of rain outside makes the room feel hushed and separate, She picks up a pencil left on the desk, its tip blunted from the morning's notes, A quiet, satisfied feeling settles in, like the day has left a small, tangible mark, everyday life in Shanghai
Style: anime slice-of-life illustration, light novel aesthetic, beautiful girl appeal, clean color design, non-photorealistic, daily record mood
Camera: partial first-person presence
Mood: slightly chunibyo, gentle, private ritual energy, lived-in daily texture, non-commercial, contemplative, the faint, dry rasp of graphite on paper pad
Details: include at least one readable character trace such as a hand holding a phone or drink, a sleeve edge or outfit edge, hair tip or a small red hairclip, a reflection, shadow, or mirror hint
Hard constraints: no empty scenery without character presence, no ad poster feeling, no tourism poster feeling, no glossy fashion editorial look, no photoreal live-action look, no text, subtitle, watermark, or UI overlay
promptPackage.negativePrompt: ad poster, glossy editorial, text, watermark, platform UI overlay, extra fingers, bad anatomy, duplicate objects, chaotic clutter, irrelevant fantasy props, tourism poster, empty aesthetic wallpaper, staged look, over-symmetry, over-polished look, text, subtitle, watermark, logo, UI overlay, extra fingers, bad hands, broken anatomy, duplicate objects, identity drift, empty scenery without character trace, tourism poster, ad poster, glossy editorial, photoreal live action
shotNotes: Hand holding a worn-down pencil, resting on an open notebook
Soft, grey window light catching the edge of the pencil's eraser
Blurred background of a desk with a closed laptop and a half-empty water glass
The soft, steady sound of rain outside makes the room feel hushed and separate
She picks up a pencil left on the desk, its tip blunted from the morning's notes
A quiet, satisfied feeling settles in, like the day has left a small, tangible mark
Prefer environment-led framing shaped by today's concrete action, found object, or discovery, not a stock backdrop.
Keep character presence readable through traces, posture, or interaction with the scene.
Let Shanghai arrive through believable local texture only when it naturally supports today's scene.
Compose around a handheld object or partial view, not a full-face selfie
Use soft, indirect lighting to match the gentle, private tone
Shift focus from self-portrait to a small object or scene detail
Change sensory focus from visual (rain, wind) to sound or texture
Hand holding a worn-down pencil, resting on an open notebook.
Soft, grey window light catching the edge of the pencil's eraser.
Blurred background of a desk with a closed laptop and a half-empty water glass.
A short observation about the weight of a used-up pencil.
Do not leave the frame as a pure empty scene; include one or two readable character traces
Preferred trace cues: hand_with_phone_or_drink, sleeve_or_outfit_edge, hair_tip_or_red_hairclip, reflection_shadow_or_mirror_hint, soft_anime_face, youthful_presence, small_red_hairclip, 清瘦脸颊, 平胸
A hand holding a phone or drink, a sleeve edge, a reflection, or a hairclip is acceptable even if the full face is absent
Use Japanese anime / bishoujo slice-of-life aesthetics rather than photorealistic live action

promptBlocks.layeringStrategy: global_style + character_core + scene + camera + mood + detail + hard_constraints
